## 🔗 Where this data comes from

Pulled automatically every hour: company ATS boards (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby) first, community feeds to fill the gaps. Roles that disappear upstream are marked 🔴 Closed on the next run. Full provenance and a removal-on-request process live in [SOURCES.md](SOURCES.md).

| Source | Listings | Type |
|---|---:|---|
| Company ATS boards (Greenhouse · Lever · Ashby) | 94 | Direct API |
| [SimplifyJobs / Summer Internships](https://github.com/SimplifyJobs/Summer2026-Internships) | 476 | Community feed |
| [vanshb03 / Summer 2027 Internships](https://github.com/vanshb03/Summer2027-Internships) | 140 | Community feed |

## 🤝 Add a listing

Takes about two minutes — copy [`templates/listing-template.json`](templates/listing-template.json) into `data/internships/<company>/<id>.json`, fill in what you know (most fields are optional), and open a PR. Details in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).
